name: Twice Baked Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake potatoes until cooled enough to handle.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F. Cut each potato in half lengthwise and scoop out the inside, leaving a sturdy shell.
3. Use a ricer to press scooped-out potato into a bowl.
4. Add cheese, sour cream, butter, milk, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Stir in bacon bits and sliced onions.
6. Fill each potato shell with the mixture.
7. Arrange potatoes in a shallow baking pan.
8. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes until golden brown.
